name: Meir North & Weston Coyney

links.title: Meir North and Weston Coyney Neighbourhood Newsletter

description:
Meir North consists of one high school, three primary schools and numerous shops.

Located in the South-East corner of the City, the neighbourhood lies to the North of the A50 Stoke-Derby link-road near the A520 Stone-Leek road.

The area is bound by the Staffordshire Moorlands district to the north.

Weston Coyney includes parts of Park Hall Country Park in the north, and an area known as Weston Sprink, playing fields and the current site of Longton High School in the south.

The area is typified by large areas of privately-owned semi-detached housing.
